title: Crispy Syrian Hazelnut Crumble
description: A sweet and crispy weeknight dish featuring hazelnuts without the use of added sugars, perfect for those sugar-free diets.
instructions: Place the hazelnuts on a baking sheet and toast them in the oven for about 10 minutes, shaking occasionally until they are golden brown.
While the nuts are toasting, combine flour and vanilla extract in a small bowl. Once the nuts are done, remove from heat and let cool.
Once cooled, stir the vanilla-flour mixture into the toasted hazelnuts gently to form a crumble consistency.
Transfer the hazelnut mixture onto an ungreased baking dish or tray. Bake for 10-15 minutes until crispy and golden brown on top.
